title: chore(deps): update dependency inquirer to v4
body:
This Pull Request updates dependency [inquirer](https://github.com/sboudrias/Inquirer.js) from `v3.3.0` to `v4.0.0`


### Commits

<details>
<summary>sboudrias/Inquirer.js</summary>

#### 4.0.0
-   [`984de6a`](https://github.com/sboudrias/Inquirer.js/commit/984de6a0bff3bbd1d7d38745b56ed1e94a40933c) 4.0.0
-   [`0f41188`](https://github.com/sboudrias/Inquirer.js/commit/0f41188cb9a514d5d8e3a04e6916c9b4e366ce30) Add Node 4 deprecation notice
-   [`a8ee5d0`](https://github.com/sboudrias/Inquirer.js/commit/a8ee5d0f37b24cef46466ab59419cdd8529381f7) Officially drop node 4 support
-   [`1674919`](https://github.com/sboudrias/Inquirer.js/commit/1674919ae1deda125b223311da58322103d54cb9) Get rid of code cimate (isn't useful enough and always start failing at some point on PR...)
-   [`5b4253c`](https://github.com/sboudrias/Inquirer.js/commit/5b4253c0f8a1e7a2b52aef11fced1be5c043aaa5) es6ification of the code base, bye bye gulp, hello Prettier
-   [`70174ed`](https://github.com/sboudrias/Inquirer.js/commit/70174ed90991c1f413e82174f609617bcf03a7c1) Paginator now handles multiple lines (#​602)
-   [`b701876`](https://github.com/sboudrias/Inquirer.js/commit/b70187688080917ab2901606fff440c3f036cdaa) Adds string default option for list and rawlist (#​609)
-   [`ce4e858`](https://github.com/sboudrias/Inquirer.js/commit/ce4e8583f4069bead19a69f162ce9d5a5fe1fa24) Guard list against invalid string defaults (#​607)
-   [`651a569`](https://github.com/sboudrias/Inquirer.js/commit/651a569ccf37a8d8dd6ae4f348c414bab3649c19) Update eslint-config-xo-space to the latest version 🚀 (#​600)
-   [`60b9ba7`](https://github.com/sboudrias/Inquirer.js/commit/60b9ba71d3bca9d120525a39c3bc1bc6149f2de4) chore(package): update mocha to version 4.0.0 (#​594)
-   [`23d440e`](https://github.com/sboudrias/Inquirer.js/commit/23d440e13ae248b1b4be4a659a6bdf13432dec91) chore(package): update sinon to version 4.0.0 (#​591)

</details>
